'''天白'''（てんぱく、あましろ）は、日本各地にある地名。[[天白信仰]]に由来する。 == 姓名 == * 天白 - [[日本人]]の[[姓]]。 ** [[天白奏音]]（[[子役]]） ** [[天白松嵐]]（[[染織家]]・[[画家]]） == 地名 == === 自治体・行政区 === * [[天白区]] - [[名古屋市]]の[[行政区]]。 * [[天白村 (愛知県)]] - [[愛知県]][[愛知郡 (愛知県)|愛知郡]]にあった村。現在の名古屋市。 * [[天白村 (三重県)]] - [[三重県]][[一志郡]]にあった村。現在の[[松阪市]]。 === 河川 === * [[天白川 (愛知県)]] - 愛知県名古屋市・[[東海市]]・[[日進市]]を流れる[[二級河川]]。 ** [[植田川|天白川 (愛知県、別流路)]] - 愛知県名古屋市・[[長久手市]]を流れる二級河川。 ** [[岩崎川 (愛知県)|天白川 (愛知県、別流路)]] - 愛知県日進市を流れる二級河川。 * [[天白川 (田原市)]] - 愛知県[[田原市]]を流れる二級河川。 * 天白川 (東浦町) - 愛知県[[知多郡]][[東浦町]]を流れる小川（河川名）の俗称。 * [[天白川 (三重県)]] - 三重県[[四日市市]]を流れる二級河川。 === 池沼 === * [[天白渓#下池|天白渓下池]] - 愛知県名古屋市天白区にあるため池。下池とも。 * [[天白渓#天白渓湿地|天白渓湿地 (本来) ]] - 愛知県名古屋市天白区にあった湿地。 * [[天白渓#天白渓湿地|天白渓湿地 (現在) ]] - 愛知県名古屋市天白区にある湿地。 === 町・字 === * [[天白町 (岡崎市)]] - 愛知県[[岡崎市]]の[[町|町名]]。 * [[鳴海町 (名古屋市)|鳴海町]]天白 - [[名古屋市]][[緑区 (名古屋市)|緑区]]の[[小字]]。 * [[天白町 (名古屋市)]] - 愛知県名古屋市南区の町名。 * 天白町 (名古屋市、旧天白村) - 愛知県名古屋市の町名。[[天白区]]、[[名東区]]、[[千種区]]に広がる。 ** [[天白町八事]] ** [[天白町島田]] ** [[天白町平針]] ** [[天白町植田]] ** [[天白町野並]] === その他 === * [[天白渓]] == 施設 == === 学校 === * [[名古屋市立天白小学校]] * [[名古屋市立天白中学校]] * [[名古屋市立南天白中学校]] * [[愛知県立天白高等学校]] * [[松阪市立天白小学校]] === 公園 === * [[天白公園|天白公園 (愛知県)]] - 愛知県名古屋市天白区にある[[公園]]。 * 天白川緑地 - 愛知県名古屋市にある公園。 * [[天白公園 (高森町)]] - [[長野県]][[下伊那郡]][[高森町 (長野県)|高森町]]にある公園。 ** 天白幼児公園 * 天白公園 (南木曽町) - 長野県[[木曽郡]][[南木曽町]]にある公園。 === 遺跡 === * [[天白古墳]] - 長野県[[上伊那郡]][[宮田村]]にあった[[古墳]]。現在は消滅。 * [[天白磐座遺跡]] - [[静岡県]][[浜松市]][[浜名区]][[引佐町井伊谷]]にある[[祭祀遺跡]]。 * [[天白遺跡]] - 三重県松阪市にある祭祀遺跡。 === その他 === * [[天白スポーツセンター]] * [[名古屋市天白図書館]] * [[天白警察署]] * [[天白消防署]] * [[天白郵便局]] * [[天白護床工]] == その他 == * [[天白神]] * [[天白信仰]] * [[天白羽鳥命]] - [[長白羽神]]のこと。 * [[天白羽鳥神]] - 長白羽神のこと。 * [[天白信用農業協同組合]] == 関連項目 == * {{Prefix|天白}} * [[天白川|天白川 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[天白村|天白村 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[天白小学校]] * [[天白信仰]]

'''天白'''（てんぱく、あましろ）は、日本各地にある地名。[[天白信仰]]に由来する。 == 姓名 == * 天白 - [[日本人]]の[[姓]]。 ** [[天白奏音]]（[[子役]]） ** [[天白松嵐]]（[[染織家]]・[[画家]]） == 地名 == === 自治体・行政区 === * [[天白区]] - [[愛知県]][[名古屋市]]の[[行政区]]。 * [[天白村 (愛知県)]] - 愛知県[[愛知郡 (愛知県)|愛知郡]]にあった村。現在の名古屋市。 * [[天白村 (三重県)]] - [[三重県]][[一志郡]]にあった村。現在の[[松阪市]]。
=== 河川 === * [[天白川 (愛知県)]] - 愛知県名古屋市・[[東海市]]・[[日進市]]を流れる[[二級河川]]。 ** [[植田川|天白川 (愛知県、別流路)]] - 愛知県名古屋市・[[長久手市]]を流れる二級河川。 ** [[岩崎川 (愛知県)|天白川 (愛知県、別流路)]] - 愛知県日進市を流れる二級河川。 * [[天白川 (田原市)]] - 愛知県[[田原市]]を流れる二級河川。 * 天白川 (東浦町) - 愛知県[[知多郡]][[東浦町]]を流れる小川（河川名）の俗称。 * [[天白川 (三重県)]] - 三重県[[四日市市]]を流れる二級河川。 * 天白用水 - 愛知県にあった用水路。
=== 池沼 === * [[天白渓#下池|天白渓下池]] - 愛知県名古屋市天白区にあるため池。下池とも。 * [[天白渓#天白渓湿地|天白渓湿地 (本来) ]] - 愛知県名古屋市天白区にあった湿地。 * [[天白渓#天白渓湿地|天白渓湿地 (現在) ]] - 愛知県名古屋市天白区にある湿地。 === 町・字 === * [[天白町 (岡崎市)]] - 愛知県[[岡崎市]]の[[町|町名]]。 * [[鳴海町 (名古屋市)|鳴海町]]天白 - [[名古屋市]][[緑区 (名古屋市)|緑区]]の[[小字]]。 * [[天白町 (名古屋市)]] - 愛知県名古屋市南区の町名。 * 天白町 (名古屋市、旧天白村) - 愛知県名古屋市の町名。[[天白区]]、[[名東区]]、[[千種区]]に広がる。 ** [[天白町八事]] ** [[天白町島田]] ** [[天白町平針]] ** [[天白町植田]] ** [[天白町野並]] === その他 === * [[天白渓]] == 施設 == === 学校 === * [[名古屋市立天白小学校]] * [[名古屋市立天白中学校]] * [[名古屋市立南天白中学校]] * [[愛知県立天白高等学校]] * [[松阪市立天白小学校]] === 公園 === * [[天白公園|天白公園 (愛知県)]] - 愛知県名古屋市天白区にある[[公園]]。 * 天白川緑地 - 愛知県名古屋市にある公園。 * [[天白公園 (高森町)]] - [[長野県]][[下伊那郡]][[高森町 (長野県)|高森町]]にある公園。 ** 天白幼児公園 * 天白公園 (南木曽町) - 長野県[[木曽郡]][[南木曽町]]にある公園。 === 遺跡 === * [[天白古墳]] - 長野県[[上伊那郡]][[宮田村]]にあった[[古墳]]。現在は消滅。 * [[天白磐座遺跡]] - [[静岡県]][[浜松市]][[浜名区]][[引佐町井伊谷]]にある[[祭祀遺跡]]。 * [[天白遺跡]] - 三重県松阪市にある祭祀遺跡。 === その他 === * [[天白スポーツセンター]] * [[名古屋市天白図書館]] * [[天白警察署]] * [[天白消防署]] * [[天白郵便局]] * [[天白護床工]] * 天白原演習場 - 愛知県豊橋市にあった演習場。[[天伯原演習場]]のこと。
== その他 == * [[天白神]] * [[天白信仰]] * [[天白羽鳥命]] - [[長白羽神]]のこと。 * [[天白羽鳥神]] - 長白羽神のこと。 * [[天白信用農業協同組合]] == 関連項目 == * {{Prefix|天白}} * [[天白川|天白川 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[天白村|天白村 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[天白小学校|天白小学校 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[天白信仰]]

revision.text:
'''天白'''（てんぱく、あましろ）は、日本各地にある地名。[[天白信仰]]に由来する。 == 姓名 == * 天白 - [[日本人]]の[[姓]]。 ** [[天白奏音]]（[[子役]]） ** [[天白松嵐]]（[[染織家]]・[[画家]]） == 地名 == ;自治体・行政区 * [[天白区]] - [[愛知県]][[名古屋市]]の[[行政区]]。 * [[天白村 (愛知県)]] - 愛知県[[愛知郡 (愛知県)|愛知郡]]にあった村。現在の名古屋市。 * [[天白村 (三重県)]] - [[三重県]][[一志郡]]にあった村。現在の[[松阪市]]。
;町・字 * [[天白町 (岡崎市)]] - 愛知県[[岡崎市]]の[[町|町名]]。 * [[鳴海町 (名古屋市)|鳴海町]]天白 - [[名古屋市]][[緑区 (名古屋市)|緑区]]の[[小字]]。 * [[天白町 (名古屋市)]] - 愛知県名古屋市南区の町名。 * 天白町 (名古屋市、旧天白村) - 愛知県名古屋市の町名。 ** [[天白町八事]] ** [[天白町島田]] ** [[天白町平針]] ** [[天白町植田]] ** [[天白町野並]] * 春木天白 - 愛知県愛知郡東郷町の小字。
;河川・池沼 * [[天白川 (愛知県)]] - 愛知県名古屋市・[[東海市]]・[[日進市]]を流れる[[二級河川]]。 * [[天白川 (田原市)]] - 愛知県[[田原市]]を流れる二級河川。 * 天白川 (東浦町) - 愛知県[[知多郡]][[東浦町]]を流れる小川（河川名）の俗称。 * [[天白川 (三重県)]] - 三重県[[四日市市]]を流れる二級河川。 * 天白用水 - 愛知県にあった用水路。 * [[天白渓#下池|天白渓下池]] * [[天白渓#天白渓湿地|天白渓湿地]]
;その他 * [[天白渓]]
== 施設 == * [[名古屋市立天白小学校]] * [[名古屋市立天白中学校]] * [[名古屋市立南天白中学校]] * [[愛知県立天白高等学校]] * [[松阪市立天白小学校]] * [[天白公園|天白公園 (愛知県)]] * [[天白公園 (高森町)]] - [[長野県]][[下伊那郡]][[高森町 (長野県)|高森町]]にある公園。 * 天白公園 (南木曽町) - 長野県[[木曽郡]][[南木曽町]]にある公園。 * [[天白川緑地]] * [[天白スポーツセンター]] * [[名古屋市天白図書館]] * [[天白警察署]] * [[天白消防署]] * [[天白郵便局]] * [[天白護床工]] * 天白原演習場 - 愛知県豊橋市にあった演習場。[[天伯原演習場]]のこと。
== その他 == * 天白古墳 * [[天白磐座遺跡]] * [[天白遺跡]] * [[天白神]] * [[天白信仰]] * [[天白羽鳥命]] - [[長白羽神]]のこと。 * [[天白羽鳥神]] - 長白羽神のこと。 * [[天白信用農業協同組合]] == 関連項目 == * {{Prefix|天白}} * [[天白川|天白川 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[天白村|天白村 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[天白小学校|天白小学校 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[天白信仰]]
{{aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:てんはく}} [[Category:日本の地名]] [[Category:同名の地名]] [[Category:日本語の姓]] [[Category:地名姓]]

'''天白'''（てんぱく、あましろ）は、日本各地にある地名。[[天白信仰]]に由来する。 == 姓名 == * 天白 - [[日本人]]の[[姓]]。 ** [[天白奏音]]（[[子役]]） ** [[天白松嵐]]（[[染織家]]・[[画家]]） == 地名 == ;自治体・行政区 * [[天白区]] - [[愛知県]][[名古屋市]]の[[行政区]]。 * [[天白村 (愛知県)]] - 愛知県[[愛知郡 (愛知県)|愛知郡]]にあった村。現在の名古屋市。 * [[天白村 (三重県)]] - [[三重県]][[一志郡]]にあった村。現在の[[松阪市]]。
;町・字 * [[天白町 (岡崎市)]] - 愛知県[[岡崎市]]の[[町|町名]]。 * [[鳴海町 (名古屋市)|鳴海町]]天白 - [[名古屋市]][[緑区 (名古屋市)|緑区]]の[[小字]]。 * [[天白町 (名古屋市)]] - 愛知県名古屋市南区の町名。 * 天白町 (名古屋市、旧天白村) - 愛知県名古屋市の町名。 ** [[天白町八事]] ** [[天白町島田]] ** [[天白町平針]] ** [[天白町植田]] ** [[天白町野並]] * 春木天白 - 愛知県愛知郡東郷町の小字。

;その他 * [[天白渓]]
== 施設 == * [[名古屋市立天白小学校]] * [[名古屋市立天白中学校]] * [[名古屋市立南天白中学校]] * [[愛知県立天白高等学校]] * [[松阪市立天白小学校]] * [[天白公園|天白公園 (愛知県)]] * [[天白公園 (高森町)]] - [[長野県]][[下伊那郡]][[高森町 (長野県)|高森町]]にある公園。 * 天白公園 (南木曽町) - 長野県[[木曽郡]][[南木曽町]]にある公園。 * [[天白川緑地]] * [[天白スポーツセンター]] * [[名古屋市天白図書館]] * [[天白警察署]] * [[天白消防署]] * [[天白郵便局]] * [[天白護床工]] * 天白原演習場 - 愛知県豊橋市にあった演習場。[[天伯原演習場]]のこと。
== その他 == * 天白古墳 * [[天白磐座遺跡]] * [[天白遺跡]] * [[天白神]] * [[天白信仰]] * [[天白羽鳥命]] - [[長白羽神]]のこと。 * [[天白羽鳥神]] - 長白羽神のこと。 * [[天白信用農業協同組合]] == 関連項目 == * {{Prefix|天白}} * [[天白川|天白川 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[天白村|天白村 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[天白小学校|天白小学校 (曖昧さ回避)]] * [[天白信仰]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q131227565]]
Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
'''Tenpaku''' (天白, also pronounced Amashiro) refers to various place names in Japan, derived from {{ill|Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku Faith|ja|天白信仰|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku faith|qq=}}.

== Names ==
* Tenpaku – A Japanese {{ill|surname|ja|姓|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/surname|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=xing|WD=Q61942409}}.
** {{ill|Kanade Tenpaku|ja|天白奏音|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanade Tenpaku|qq=|1=Kanade Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106994497}} ([[:en:Child actor|child actor]])
** {{ill|Shōran Tenpaku|ja|天白松嵐|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōran Tenpaku|qq=|1=Shōran Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443113}} (dye artist and painter)

== Place Names ==
;Municipalities and Administrative Districts
* [[:en:Tenpaku-ku|Tenpaku Ward]] – An administrative ward of [[:en:Nagoya|Nagoya City]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]].
* {{ill|Tenpaku Village (Aichi)|ja|天白村 (愛知県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Village (Aichi)|qq=|1=Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17177017}} – A former village in [[:en:Aichi District|Aichi District (Aichi Prefecture)]], now part of Nagoya City.
* {{ill|Tenpaku Village (Mie)|ja|天白村 (三重県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Village (Mie)|qq=|1=Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175728}} – A former village in [[:en:Ichishi District, Mie|Ichishi District]], now part of [[:en:Matsusaka|Matsusaka City]].

;Towns and Districts
* {{ill|Tenpaku Town (Okazaki City)|ja|天白町 (岡崎市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town (Okazaki City)|qq=|1=Tenpaku-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17218861}} – A town in [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki City]], Aichi Prefecture.
* {{ill|Narumi Town (Nagoya City)|ja|鳴海町 (名古屋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Narumi Town (Nagoya City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} Tenpaku – A sub-district of [[:en:Midori-ku, Nagoya|Midori Ward (Nagoya)]], Nagoya City.
* {{ill|Tenpaku Town (Nagoya City)|ja|天白町 (名古屋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town (Nagoya City)|qq=|1=Tempaku-chō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55527013}} – A district in [[:en:Minami-ku, Nagoya|Minami Ward (Nagoya)]].
* Tenpaku Town (Nagoya City, Former Tenpaku Village) – Includes:
** {{ill|Tenpaku Town Yagoto|ja|天白町八事|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town Yagoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八事|1=Yagoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390489}}
** {{ill|Tenpaku Town Shimada|ja|天白町島田|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town Shimada|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 島田 (名古屋市)|1=Shimada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55525481}}
** {{ill|Tenpaku Town Hirabari|ja|天白町平針|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town Hirabari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 平針|1=Hirabari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q54152593}}
** {{ill|Tenpaku Town Ueda|ja|天白町植田|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town Ueda|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 植田 (名古屋市)|1=Ueda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55525462}}
** {{ill|Tenpaku Town Nonami|ja|天白町野並|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town Nonami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 野並|1=Nonami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7049182}}
* Haruki Tenpaku – A sub-district in [[:en:Tōgō, Aichi|Tōgō Town]], Aichi District.

;Rivers and Lakes
* {{ill|Tenpaku River (Aichi)|ja|天白川 (愛知県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku River (Aichi)|qq=|1=Tenpaku River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443111}} – A Class 2 river flowing through Nagoya, Tokai, and Nisshin in Aichi Prefecture.
* {{ill|Tenpaku River (Tahara)|ja|天白川 (田原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku River (Tahara)|qq=|1=Tenpaku River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132044415}} – A Class 2 river in [[:en:Tahara, Aichi|Tahara City]], Aichi Prefecture.
* Tenpaku River (Higashiura Town) – A small river in [[:en:Higashiura|Higashiura Town]], Chita District, Aichi Prefecture.
* {{ill|Tenpaku River (Mie)|ja|天白川 (三重県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku River (Mie)|qq=|1=Tenpaku River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17174431}} – A Class 2 river in [[:en:Yokkaichi|Yokkaichi City]], Mie Prefecture.
* Tenpaku Irrigation – A former canal in Aichi Prefecture.
* {{ill|Lower Pond of Tenpaku Gorge|ja|天白渓#下池|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lower Pond of Tenpaku Gorge|qq=|1=Lower Pond of Tenpaku Gorge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132132164}}
* {{ill|Tenpaku Gorge Wetland|ja|天白渓#天白渓湿地|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Gorge Wetland|qq=|1=Tenpaku Gorge Wetland|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132132164}}

;Other Locations
* {{ill|Tenpaku Gorge|ja|天白渓|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Gorge|qq=|1=Tenpaku Gorge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132132164}}

* {{ill|Nagoya City Tenpaku Elementary School|ja|名古屋市立天白小学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagoya City Tenpaku Elementary School|qq=|1=Nagoya City Tenpaku Elementary School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21653958}}

* {{ill|Nagoya City Minami-Tenpaku Junior High School|ja|名古屋市立南天白中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagoya City Minami-Tenpaku Junior High School|qq=|1=Nagoya City Minami-Tenpaku Junior High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21653973}}
* {{ill|Aichi Prefectural Tenpaku High School|ja|愛知県立天白高等学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aichi Prefectural Tenpaku High School|qq=|1=Aichi Prefectural Tenpaku High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11494199}}
* {{ill|Matsusaka City Tenpaku Elementary School|ja|松阪市立天白小学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsusaka City Tenpaku Elementary School|qq=|1=Matsusaka City Tenpaku Elementary School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532361}}
* {{ill|Tenpaku Park (Aichi)|ja|天白公園 (愛知県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Park (Aichi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Tenpaku Park (Takamori Town)|ja|天白公園 (高森町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Park (Takamori Town)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – A park in [[:en:Takamori, Nagano|Takamori Town (Nagano)]], Shimoina District, Nagano Prefecture.
* Tenpaku Park (Nagiso Town) – A park in [[:en:Nagiso|Nagiso Town]], Kiso District, Nagano Prefecture.
* {{ill|Tenpaku River Green Space|ja|天白川緑地|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku River Green Space|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}

* {{ill|Nagoya City Tenpaku Library|ja|名古屋市天白図書館|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagoya City Tenpaku Library|qq=|1=Nagoyashitempaku Library|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21653944}}

* {{ill|Tenpaku Fire Station|ja|天白消防署|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Fire Station|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}

* Tenpaku Field Practice Area – A former practice ground in Toyohashi City, Aichi Prefecture, also known as {{ill|Tenpaku Hara Field Practice Area|ja|天伯原演習場|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Hara Field Practice Area|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

'''Tenpaku''' (天白, also pronounced Amashiro) refers to various place names in Japan, derived from {{ill|Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku Faith|ja|天白信仰|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku faith|qq=}}.

== Names ==

'''Tenpaku''' (天白, also pronounced Amashiro) refers to various place names in Japan, derived from {{ill|Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku Faith|ja|天白信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku faith|qq=}}.

== Names ==
* Tenpaku – A Japanese {{ill|surname|ja|姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/surname|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=xing|WD=Q61942409}}.
** {{ill|Kanade Tenpaku|ja|天白奏音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanade Tenpaku|1=Kanade Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106994497}} ([[:en:Child actor|child actor]])

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q131227565]]
Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
'''Tenpaku''' (天白, also pronounced Amashiro) refers to various place names in Japan, derived from {{ill|Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku Faith|ja|天白信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku faith|qq=}}.

== Names ==
* Tenpaku – A Japanese {{ill|surname|ja|姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/surname|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=xing|WD=Q61942409}}.
** {{ill|Kanade Tenpaku|ja|天白奏音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanade Tenpaku|1=Kanade Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106994497}} ([[:en:Child actor|child actor]])
** {{ill|Shōran Tenpaku|ja|天白松嵐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōran Tenpaku|1=Shōran Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443113}} (dye artist and painter)

== Names ==
* Tenpaku – A Japanese {{ill|surname|ja|姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/surname|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=xing|WD=Q61942409}}.
** {{ill|Kanade Tenpaku|ja|天白奏音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanade Tenpaku|1=Kanade Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106994497}} ([[:en:Child actor|child actor]])

== Names ==
* Tenpaku – A Japanese {{ill|surname|ja|姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/surname|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=xing|WD=Q61942409}}.
** {{ill|Kanade Tenpaku|ja|天白奏音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanade Tenpaku|1=Kanade Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106994497}} ([[:en:Child actor|child actor]])

Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
'''Tenpaku''' (天白, also pronounced Amashiro) refers to various place names in Japan, derived from {{ill|Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku Faith|ja|天白信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku faith|qq=}}.

== Names ==
* Tenpaku – A Japanese {{ill|surname|ja|姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/surname|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=xing|WD=Q61942409}}.
** {{ill|Kanade Tenpaku|ja|天白奏音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanade Tenpaku|1=Kanade Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106994497}} ([[:en:Child actor|child actor]])
** {{ill|Shōran Tenpaku|ja|天白松嵐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōran Tenpaku|1=Shōran Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443113}} (dye artist and painter)

'''Tenpaku''' (天白, also pronounced Amashiro) refers to various place names in Japan, derived from {{ill|Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku Faith|ja|天白信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku faith|qq=}}.

== Names ==
* Tenpaku – A Japanese {{ill|surname|ja|姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/surname|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=xing|WD=Q61942409}}.
** {{ill|Kanade Tenpaku|ja|天白奏音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanade Tenpaku|1=Kanade Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106994497}} ([[:en:Child actor|child actor]])

'''Tenpaku''' (天白, also pronounced Amashiro) refers to various place names in Japan, derived from {{ill|Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku Faith|ja|天白信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku faith|qq=}}.

== Names ==
* Tenpaku – A Japanese {{ill|surname|ja|姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/surname|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=xing|WD=Q61942409}}.
** {{ill|Kanade Tenpaku|ja|天白奏音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanade Tenpaku|1=Kanade Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106994497}} ([[:en:Child actor|child actor]])

'''Tenpaku''' (天白, also pronounced Amashiro) refers to various place names in Japan, derived from {{ill|Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku Faith|ja|天白信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku faith|qq=}}.

== Names ==
* Tenpaku – A Japanese {{ill|surname|ja|姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/surname|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=xing|WD=Q61942409}}.
** {{ill|Kanade Tenpaku|ja|天白奏音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanade Tenpaku|1=Kanade Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106994497}} ({{ill|Child actor|en|Child actor|WD=Q970153|lt=child actor}})
** {{ill|Shōran Tenpaku|ja|天白松嵐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōran Tenpaku|1=Shōran Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443113}} (dye artist and painter)

'''Tenpaku''' (天白, also pronounced Amashiro) refers to various place names in Japan, derived from {{ill|Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku Faith|ja|天白信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku faith|qq=}}.

== Names ==
* Tenpaku – A Japanese {{ill|surname|ja|姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/surname|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=xing|WD=Q61942409}}.
** {{ill|Kanade Tenpaku|ja|天白奏音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanade Tenpaku|1=Kanade Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106994497}} ({{ill|Child actor|en|Child actor|WD=Q970153|lt=child actor}})
** {{ill|Shōran Tenpaku|ja|天白松嵐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōran Tenpaku|1=Shōran Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443113}} (dye artist and painter)

== Place Names ==
;Municipalities and Administrative Districts
* {{ill|Tenpaku-ku|en|Tenpaku-ku|WD=Q1155245|lt=Tenpaku Ward}} – An administrative ward of {{ill|Nagoya|en|Nagoya|WD=Q11751|lt=Nagoya City}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}.
* {{ill|Tenpaku Village (Aichi)|ja|天白村 (愛知県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Village (Aichi)|1=Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17177017}} – A former village in {{ill|Aichi District|en|Aichi District|WD=Q552687|lt=Aichi District (Aichi Prefecture)}}, now part of Nagoya City.
* {{ill|Tenpaku Village (Mie)|ja|天白村 (三重県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Village (Mie)|1=Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175728}} – A former village in {{ill|Ichishi District, Mie|en|Ichishi District, Mie|WD=Q5986318|lt=Ichishi District}}, now part of {{ill|Matsusaka|en|Matsusaka|WD=Q460829|lt=Matsusaka City}}.

;Towns and Districts
* {{ill|Tenpaku Town (Okazaki City)|ja|天白町 (岡崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town (Okazaki City)|1=Tenpaku-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17218861}} – A town in {{ill|Okazaki, Aichi|en|Okazaki, Aichi|WD=Q242783|lt=Okazaki City}}, Aichi Prefecture.
* {{ill|Narumi Town (Nagoya City)|ja|鳴海町 (名古屋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Narumi Town (Nagoya City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} Tenpaku – A sub-district of {{ill|Midori-ku, Nagoya|en|Midori-ku, Nagoya|WD=Q1155209|lt=Midori Ward (Nagoya)}}, Nagoya City.
* {{ill|Tenpaku Town (Nagoya City)|ja|天白町 (名古屋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town (Nagoya City)|1=Tempaku-chō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55527013}} – A district in {{ill|Minami-ku, Nagoya|en|Minami-ku, Nagoya|WD=Q1155286|lt=Minami Ward (Nagoya)}}.
* Tenpaku Town (Nagoya City, Former Tenpaku Village) – Includes:
** {{ill|Tenpaku Town Yagoto|ja|天白町八事|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town Yagoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八事|1=Yagoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390489}}
** {{ill|Tenpaku Town Shimada|ja|天白町島田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town Shimada|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 島田 (名古屋市)|1=Shimada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55525481}}
** {{ill|Tenpaku Town Hirabari|ja|天白町平針|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town Hirabari|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 平針|1=Hirabari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q54152593}}
** {{ill|Tenpaku Town Ueda|ja|天白町植田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town Ueda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 植田 (名古屋市)|1=Ueda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55525462}}
** {{ill|Tenpaku Town Nonami|ja|天白町野並|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town Nonami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 野並|1=Nonami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7049182}}
* Haruki Tenpaku – A sub-district in {{ill|Tōgō, Aichi|en|Tōgō, Aichi|WD=Q265050|lt=Tōgō Town}}, Aichi District.

;Rivers and Lakes
* {{ill|Tenpaku River (Aichi)|ja|天白川 (愛知県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku River (Aichi)|1=Tenpaku River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443111}} – A Class 2 river flowing through Nagoya, Tokai, and Nisshin in Aichi Prefecture.
* {{ill|Tenpaku River (Tahara)|ja|天白川 (田原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku River (Tahara)|1=Tenpaku River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132044415}} – A Class 2 river in {{ill|Tahara, Aichi|en|Tahara, Aichi|WD=Q501891|lt=Tahara City}}, Aichi Prefecture.
* Tenpaku River (Higashiura Town) – A small river in {{ill|Higashiura|en|Higashiura|WD=Q677745|lt=Higashiura Town}}, Chita District, Aichi Prefecture.
* {{ill|Tenpaku River (Mie)|ja|天白川 (三重県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku River (Mie)|1=Tenpaku River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17174431}} – A Class 2 river in {{ill|Yokkaichi|en|Yokkaichi|WD=Q26410|lt=Yokkaichi City}}, Mie Prefecture.
* Tenpaku Irrigation – A former canal in Aichi Prefecture.
* {{ill|Lower Pond of Tenpaku Gorge|ja|天白渓#下池|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lower Pond of Tenpaku Gorge|1=Lower Pond of Tenpaku Gorge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132132164}}
* {{ill|Tenpaku Gorge Wetland|ja|天白渓#天白渓湿地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Gorge Wetland|1=Tenpaku Gorge Wetland|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132132164}}

;Other Locations
* {{ill|Tenpaku Gorge|ja|天白渓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Gorge|1=Tenpaku Gorge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132132164}}

* {{ill|Aichi Prefectural Tenpaku High School|ja|愛知県立天白高等学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aichi Prefectural Tenpaku High School|1=Aichi Prefectural Tenpaku High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11494199}}
* {{ill|Matsusaka City Tenpaku Elementary School|ja|松阪市立天白小学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsusaka City Tenpaku Elementary School|1=Matsusaka City Tenpaku Elementary School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532361}}

'''Tenpaku''' (天白, also pronounced Amashiro) refers to various place names in Japan, derived from {{ill|Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku Faith|ja|天白信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku faith|qq=}}.

== Names ==
* Tenpaku – A Japanese {{ill|surname|ja|姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/surname|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Chinese ancestral surname|WD=Q61942409}}.
** {{ill|Kanade Tenpaku|ja|天白奏音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanade Tenpaku|1=Q106994497|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106994497}} ({{ill|Child actor|en|Child actor|WD=Q970153|lt=child actor|1=Child actor}})
** {{ill|Shōran Tenpaku|ja|天白松嵐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōran Tenpaku|1=Shōran Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443113}} (dye artist and painter)

== Place Names ==
;Municipalities and Administrative Districts
* {{ill|Tenpaku-ku|en|Tenpaku-ku|WD=Q1155245|lt=Tenpaku Ward|1=Tenpaku-ku}} – An administrative ward of {{ill|Nagoya|en|Nagoya|WD=Q11751|lt=Nagoya City|1=Nagoya}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}.
* {{ill|Tenpaku Village (Aichi)|ja|天白村 (愛知県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Village (Aichi)|1=Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17177017}} – A former village in {{ill|Aichi District|en|Aichi District|WD=Q552687|lt=Aichi District (Aichi Prefecture)|1=Aichi District}}, now part of Nagoya City.
* {{ill|Tenpaku Village (Mie)|ja|天白村 (三重県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Village (Mie)|1=Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175728}} – A former village in {{ill|Ichishi District, Mie|en|Ichishi District, Mie|WD=Q5986318|lt=Ichishi District|1=Ichishi District, Mie}}, now part of {{ill|Matsusaka|en|Matsusaka|WD=Q460829|lt=Matsusaka City|1=Matsusaka}}.

;Towns and Districts
* {{ill|Tenpaku Town (Okazaki City)|ja|天白町 (岡崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town (Okazaki City)|1=Tenpaku-chō, Okazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17218861}} – A town in {{ill|Okazaki, Aichi|en|Okazaki, Aichi|WD=Q242783|lt=Okazaki City|1=Okazaki, Aichi}}, Aichi Prefecture.
* {{ill|Narumi Town (Nagoya City)|ja|鳴海町 (名古屋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Narumi Town (Nagoya City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} Tenpaku – A sub-district of {{ill|Midori-ku, Nagoya|en|Midori-ku, Nagoya|WD=Q1155209|lt=Midori Ward (Nagoya)|1=Midori-ku, Nagoya}}, Nagoya City.
* {{ill|Tenpaku Town (Nagoya City)|ja|天白町 (名古屋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town (Nagoya City)|1=Tempaku-chō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55527013}} – A district in {{ill|Minami-ku, Nagoya|en|Minami-ku, Nagoya|WD=Q1155286|lt=Minami Ward (Nagoya)|1=Minami-ku, Nagoya}}.
* Tenpaku Town (Nagoya City, Former Tenpaku Village) – Includes:
** {{ill|Tenpaku Town Yagoto|ja|天白町八事|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town Yagoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八事|1=Yagoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390489}}

** {{ill|Tenpaku Town Hirabari|ja|天白町平針|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town Hirabari|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 平針|1=Hirabari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q54152593}}
** {{ill|Tenpaku Town Ueda|ja|天白町植田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town Ueda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 植田 (名古屋市)|1=Ueda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55525462}}
** {{ill|Tenpaku Town Nonami|ja|天白町野並|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Town Nonami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 野並|1=Nonami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7049182}}
* Haruki Tenpaku – A sub-district in {{ill|Tōgō, Aichi|en|Tōgō, Aichi|WD=Q265050|lt=Tōgō Town|1=Tōgō, Aichi}}, Aichi District.

;Rivers and Lakes
* {{ill|Tenpaku River (Aichi)|ja|天白川 (愛知県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku River (Aichi)|1=Tenpaku River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443111}} – A Class 2 river flowing through Nagoya, Tokai, and Nisshin in Aichi Prefecture.
* {{ill|Tenpaku River (Tahara)|ja|天白川 (田原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku River (Tahara)|1=Tenpaku River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132044415}} – A Class 2 river in {{ill|Tahara, Aichi|en|Tahara, Aichi|WD=Q501891|lt=Tahara City|1=Tahara, Aichi}}, Aichi Prefecture.
* Tenpaku River (Higashiura Town) – A small river in {{ill|Higashiura|en|Higashiura|WD=Q677745|lt=Higashiura Town|1=Higashiura}}, Chita District, Aichi Prefecture.
* {{ill|Tenpaku River (Mie)|ja|天白川 (三重県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku River (Mie)|1=Tenpaku River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17174431}} – A Class 2 river in {{ill|Yokkaichi|en|Yokkaichi|WD=Q26410|lt=Yokkaichi City|1=Yokkaichi}}, Mie Prefecture.
* Tenpaku Irrigation – A former canal in Aichi Prefecture.
* {{ill|Lower Pond of Tenpaku Gorge|ja|天白渓#下池|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lower Pond of Tenpaku Gorge|1=Q132132164|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132132164}}
* {{ill|Tenpaku Gorge Wetland|ja|天白渓#天白渓湿地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Gorge Wetland|1=Q132132164|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q132132164}}

'''Tenpaku''' (天白, also pronounced Amashiro) refers to various place names in Japan, derived from {{ill|Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku Faith|ja|天白信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku faith|qq=}}.

== Names ==
* Tenpaku – A Japanese {{ill|surname|ja|姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/surname|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Chinese ancestral surname|WD=Q61942409}}.

== Place Names ==
;Municipalities and Administrative Districts
* {{ill|Tenpaku-ku|en|Tenpaku-ku|WD=Q1155245|lt=Tenpaku Ward|1=Tenpaku-ku}} – An administrative ward of {{ill|Nagoya|en|Nagoya|WD=Q11751|lt=Nagoya City|1=Nagoya}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}.

'''Tenpaku''' (天白, also pronounced Amashiro) refers to various place names in Japan, derived from {{ill|Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku faith|lt=Tenpaku Faith|ja|天白信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku faith|qq=}}.

== Names ==
* Tenpaku – A Japanese {{ill|surname|ja|姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/surname|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Chinese ancestral surname|WD=Q61942409}}.
** {{ill|Kanade Tenpaku|ja|天白奏音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanade Tenpaku|1=Q106994497|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106994497}} ({{ill|Child actor|en|Child actor|WD=Q970153|lt=child actor|1=Child actor}})
** {{ill|Shōran Tenpaku|ja|天白松嵐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōran Tenpaku|1=Shōran Tenpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443113}} (dye artist and painter)
